{{Infobox technique
| name = Furnace
| introduced = House of Blades
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The Furnace is a specialized room located within [[Valinhall]], situated only one door away from the [[library]]. This forge is an intricate space characterized by obsidian walls and various pieces of equipment, including anvils of different sizes and vats containing molten metal. The environment is intensely hot, capable of singeing skin and causing [[steel]] weapons to glow and bend. It serves as a location where the guardian is destroyed upon its death, and assignments to this room have historically been used as a form of prison sentence determined by a council of powerful individuals. The area is protected by a guardian in the form of a massive serpent composed of glowing coals and ash with eyes made of white-hot [[Iron{{!}}iron]].}}

== House of Blades ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|The [[Furnace]] is a [[technique]] [[Malachi]] uses to hurl orange fireballs.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c20">''House of Blades'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|The [[Furnace]] can be called upon by waving a brand in a specific pattern.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c21">''House of Blades'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== City of Light ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Kai]] instructed someone to take scrap metal to the [[Furnace{{!}}furnace]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c22">''City of Light'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|“Take the scrap metal to the furnace,” he said, on his way out.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c22" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
